para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: TRANSFER 2026 / P.No.29 / PRACTICE-3 (14A)
Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Reference: - General Administration Department, Government Order No. ASC-1415 / Q. 55/14 -A, D. 30.10.2015
Mr. Ulhas Maruti Kesarkar, Assistant Room Officer, Social Justice and Special Assistance Department
Auxiliary Room at the Establishment of the Ministry Restaurant by deputation under the orders of the Ministry in respect of their services.
The services of Mr. Kesarkar's deputation are now being terminated under this order. as well as
Post-retirement posting of Mr. Kesarkar, Assistant Room Officer on deputation
The post of Assistant Cell Officer in the Planning Department is being done.
Mr. Kesarkar, Assistant Room Officer should join the Planning Department immediately.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
